## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential GTM collaboration between GrowthX and Deepgram, focusing on content strategy and AI-driven SEO approaches.](https://fathom.video/share/QtWzhuxgi1p6dz4r4SKZ7oaFa7Qy7c4H?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers a unique approach to content strategy, combining editorial and programmatic SEO with AI-driven insights](https://fathom.video/share/QtWzhuxgi1p6dz4r4SKZ7oaFa7Qy7c4H?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [Their platform creates comprehensive, well-researched content that adapts to changing search behaviors and AI-powered search engines](https://fathom.video/share/QtWzhuxgi1p6dz4r4SKZ7oaFa7Qy7c4H?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
  - [GrowthX proposes an 8-week strategy sprint ($30k) to set up artifacts, workflows, and execute initial content strategies](https://fathom.video/share/QtWzhuxgi1p6dz4r4SKZ7oaFa7Qy7c4H?tab=summary&timestamp=1473.0)
  - [Potential to refresh and expand Deepgram's existing content (e.g., AI apps catalog) to better connect with core business offerings](https://fathom.video/share/QtWzhuxgi1p6dz4r4SKZ7oaFa7Qy7c4H?tab=summary&timestamp=1298.0)

## Topics

### Current Marketing Landscape and Trends

  - [Traffic patterns changing: fewer clicks but higher intent visitors (3-5x more valuable)](https://fathom.video/share/QtWzhuxgi1p6dz4r4SKZ7oaFa7Qy7c4H?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)
  - [Shift from broad searches to in-depth queries and direct brand searches](https://fathom.video/share/QtWzhuxgi1p6dz4r4SKZ7oaFa7Qy7c4H?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)
  - [Content must be well-researched, comprehensive, and show strong brand authority](https://fathom.video/share/QtWzhuxgi1p6dz4r4SKZ7oaFa7Qy7c4H?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
  - [AI-driven search optimization becoming crucial (AI answers, AI engine optimization)](https://fathom.video/share/QtWzhuxgi1p6dz4r4SKZ7oaFa7Qy7c4H?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)

### GrowthX's Content Strategy Approach

  - [Create detailed "artifacts" capturing company context and audience insights](https://fathom.video/share/QtWzhuxgi1p6dz4r4SKZ7oaFa7Qy7c4H?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
  - [Use proprietary platform for content creation, powered by AI coding agent and custom workflows](https://fathom.video/share/QtWzhuxgi1p6dz4r4SKZ7oaFa7Qy7c4H?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
  - [Combine editorial content with strategic programmatic SEO approaches](https://fathom.video/share/QtWzhuxgi1p6dz4r4SKZ7oaFa7Qy7c4H?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)
  - [Focus on audience-first content and building a "knowledge graph" of relevant topics](https://fathom.video/share/QtWzhuxgi1p6dz4r4SKZ7oaFa7Qy7c4H?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Monitor content performance and brand visibility in AI-powered search results](https://fathom.video/share/QtWzhuxgi1p6dz4r4SKZ7oaFa7Qy7c4H?tab=summary&timestamp=684.0)

### Case Studies and Examples

  - [Augment Code: Created high-quality listicle ("13 best coding tools for enterprise code bases")](https://fathom.video/share/QtWzhuxgi1p6dz4r4SKZ7oaFa7Qy7c4H?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)
  - [VAPI: Developed 2,600 AI voice agent use case pages with custom designs and prompts](https://fathom.video/share/QtWzhuxgi1p6dz4r4SKZ7oaFa7Qy7c4H?tab=summary&timestamp=771.0)
  - [Ramp: Built vendor catalog comparing business tools (e.g., Asana vs. Monday)](https://fathom.video/share/QtWzhuxgi1p6dz4r4SKZ7oaFa7Qy7c4H?tab=summary&timestamp=1052.0)
  - [Other examples: CodeLibrary.ai, per diem calculator, landlord resource hub](https://fathom.video/share/QtWzhuxgi1p6dz4r4SKZ7oaFa7Qy7c4H?tab=summary&timestamp=1101.0)

### Potential Strategies for Deepgram

  - [Refresh and expand AI apps catalog, focusing more on voice-related applications](https://fathom.video/share/QtWzhuxgi1p6dz4r4SKZ7oaFa7Qy7c4H?tab=summary&timestamp=1298.0)
  - [Create comparison pages for competing products (e.g., WhisperFlow vs. SuperWhisper)](https://fathom.video/share/QtWzhuxgi1p6dz4r4SKZ7oaFa7Qy7c4H?tab=summary&timestamp=1254.0)
  - [Develop deeper, more relevant content connecting to Deepgram's core offerings](https://fathom.video/share/QtWzhuxgi1p6dz4r4SKZ7oaFa7Qy7c4H?tab=summary&timestamp=1298.0)
  - [Implement custom CTAs, cross-linking, and callouts to better tie content to Deepgram's products](https://fathom.video/share/QtWzhuxgi1p6dz4r4SKZ7oaFa7Qy7c4H?tab=summary&timestamp=1212.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Praveen to watch full GrowthX webinar for additional context](https://fathom.video/share/QtWzhuxgi1p6dz4r4SKZ7oaFa7Qy7c4H?tab=summary&timestamp=1531.0)
  - [Deepgram team (Praveen, Hasan, Pippin) to discuss internally and evaluate potential collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/QtWzhuxgi1p6dz4r4SKZ7oaFa7Qy7c4H?tab=summary&timestamp=1543.0)
  - [Follow up with GrowthX in 1-2 weeks to discuss next steps](https://fathom.video/share/QtWzhuxgi1p6dz4r4SKZ7oaFa7Qy7c4H?tab=summary&timestamp=1538.0)
  - [Consider GrowthX's 8-week strategy sprint proposal ($30k) if moving forward](https://fathom.video/share/QtWzhuxgi1p6dz4r4SKZ7oaFa7Qy7c4H?tab=summary&timestamp=1476.0)
  - [Note: GrowthX typically has a 4-6 week lead time for new project kickoffs](https://fathom.video/share/QtWzhuxgi1p6dz4r4SKZ7oaFa7Qy7c4H?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
